title: cissus lanyuensis
intro: Cissus lanyuensis, also known as Lanyu grapevine, is a species of flowering plant in the grape family native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cissus lanyuensis include reducing inflammation, improving bone health, and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Cissus lanyuensis is often used in tea, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
